subject:
Changing Particle Diameter in Relion refinement, from the one used
 in WARP extraction
body:
Hi folks,

I extracted the particles in Warp using a certain particle diameter (say 
300A). While I do run some 3D refinements/classification using the particle 
diameter of 300A. 

But for some refinements, I want to use smaller particles. E.g., 200A or 
150A. And I do not want to re-extract the particles, at least for now;

The Relion is not complaining about any particle normalization issues and 
refinements does proceed, but I was thinking whether this has any 
systematically significant adverse effects on refinement/classification 
using particle diameter significantly lower than that used for particle 
extraction in WARP.

Thanks and cheers,
Digvijay
